notes: BG 6.35's engineering layer preserves the doctrinal non-negotiability of the abhyasa-AND-vairagya pair, joined by ca. asamsayam, durnigraham, calam preserved. The Advaita commentator's careful gloss of each (abhyasa = repeated returning of attention; vairagya = absence of hankering through seeing the defects) is preserved verbatim. Yoga Sutra 1.12 is correctly cited as cross-corpus confirmation. No tradition-conflation. PASS.
